enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannil Mazhai?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and nostalgia, capturing the emotional turmoil of a romantic relationship.

Who is the singer of Kannil Mazhai?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer Sid Sriram.

Who composed the music for Kannil Mazhai?

The music for the song was composed by Prasanna B.

When was Kannil Mazhai released?

The song was released on July 17, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kannil Mazhai is a soulful melody that delves into the depths of love and the pain of separation. The lyrics by Subu paint a vivid picture of memories and emotions that linger long after a relationship ends. Sid Sriram's emotive voice adds a layer of melancholy, making it a perfect track for moments of introspection. The music by Prasanna B complements the lyrical depth, creating a hauntingly beautiful experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kannil Mazhai is a mesmerizing track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the soulful Sid Sriram, this song is a perfect blend of emotional depth and melodic richness. With lyrics by Subu and music by Prasanna B, it promises to take you on a nostalgic journey through the corridors of your heart.
stanzaMeanings: Rain in the eyes, thunder in the heart, memories appear everywhere. What should I do?
We threw stones on the mirror, a piece of our love spoke in the morning.
When lies became truth, did it hide the truth of love?
The picture stretches like a mark on the shore of our days. Will the deep wound ever heal?
Rain in the eyes, thunder in the heart, lightning strikes.
Time, moments, and moisture are not enough for those days.
Life has no friend to ask for those days again.
Pain... light... in pain, love lasts until death.
Light, shadow of light, shining somewhere.
We threw stones on the mirror.
Love swings today like a doll dancing on a string.
Rain in the eyes, thunder in the heart, memories appear everywhere. What should I do?
Words, shadow of words, don't fade away.
Rain, disappear, the mistake of disappearing, forgotten and hidden.
Rain in the eyes, thunder in the heart, lightning strikes.
